keyMessages: WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
Pathways programs help educators identify a challenge, choose a pathway, and continue learning through partnership.
WCEPS supports schools and districts with educational resources, assessments, professional learning, program evaluations, and content alignment analyses.
proofPoints: WCEPS is described on the Pathways site as a 501(c)(3) charitable nonprofit organization.
The site says WCEPS extends the impact of University of Wisconsin-Madison educational innovations.
brief.layoutRecommendation: Use a structured one-pager with a summary column, key message cards, evidence-backed proof points, and a bottom CTA band.

headlineOptions: Customized support for schools and districts
subheadOptions: Pathways Powered by WCEPS helps education teams chart a course through research-based resources, professional learning, assessments, program.
WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
copy.body: WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs. For education leaders, this draft focuses on research-based educational supports and service pathways. WCEPS is described on the Pathways site as a 501(c)(3) charitable nonprofit organization.
bullets: WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
Pathways programs help educators identify a challenge, choose a pathway, and continue learning through partnership.
WCEPS supports schools and districts with educational resources, assessments, professional learning, program evaluations, and content alignment.
WCEPS is described on the Pathways site as a 501(c)(3) charitable nonprofit organization.
The site says WCEPS extends the impact of University of Wisconsin-Madison educational innovations.

safeZones: Create a portrait art field with enough texture to support editorial layout.
Keep important visual energy away from trim and crop edges.
Avoid document panels, empty modules, fake cards, or CTA-like shapes.
exactTextPriority: Pathways Powered by WCEPS helps education teams chart a course through research-based resources
WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
Pathways programs help educators identify a challenge, choose a pathway, and continue learning through
WCEPS supports schools and districts with educational resources, assessments, professional learning
appOwnedElements: Official WCEPS logo from approved asset.
Deterministic grid, typography, headline, audience, and CTA.
Exact support copy and proof hierarchy.
Final export wrapper, source evidence, and review state.
imageGenOwnedElements: Atmosphere, photography or illustration treatment, color, texture, and crop rhythm.
No document layout, fake cards, panels, contact bars, charts, or text.

CONTRACT=campaign-art-plate-v5

INTENT={out:one-pager, brand:WCEPS, aud:education leaders, theme:[research-based | educational | supports | service | pathways | education | leaders | parent | brand], tone:clear, institutional, practical, ground:strict}
CANVAS=1024x1536, portrait full-page marketing artifact
FORMAT=portrait campaign art plate for app-composed marketing artifact; not social/web/contact card.

BRAND_BOUNDARY={keep:[nonprofit | research-informed | customized educational support | schools | districts | educators]; avoid_sibling:[CARE Coaching | CCNA | WebbAlign | CALL | WIDA PRIME | DOK | Depth of Knowledge | PRIME process]; parent_context:[]}
BRAND_VISUAL_PROFILE={show:[educators and district teams planning support | research-informed professional learning | inclusive school and district collaboration | educational service design conversation]; props:[planning notes | educator resource packets | district strategy materials | inclusive classroom support materials]; avoid:[over-specific sub-brand scenes unless selected | generic graduation imagery | random classroom stock photography | fake university marks]; app_owned:[WCEPS logo | headline | CTA | proof copy | source evidence]; tone:[warm institutional | clean nonprofit education | credible | human | finished]; fit:editorial institutional overview with useful density and no empty panels}
LOGO=do not render any WCEPS logo, wordmark, brand initials, logo-like mark, chevron/mountain mark, arrow mark, or background logo pattern; app renders official logo once.

VISUAL_STYLE=authentic editorial photography or refined abstract-illustrative atmosphere; avoid posed training-room stock, washed-out empty fades, generic meeting-table cliches, literal brand-shape wallpaper.

imageResults.revisedPrompt: Portrait full-bleed campaign art plate for a nonprofit education brand, intended as a premium full-page marketing artifact for education leaders. Create an authentic editorial photography / refined abstract-illustrative atmosphere hybrid with layered depth and rich visual density. Scene: a bright, modern school or district office collaboration setting where educators and district team members are reviewing planning materials together, discussing research-informed support pathways, and designing inclusive learning support. Show diverse educators in a natural, human, non-posed way; keep faces not close-up and hands not detailed. Include planning notes, educator resource packets, district strategy materials, and inclusive classroom support materials as tactile visual props, but NO readable text anywhere. Tone: warm institutional, credible, practical, clean nonprofit education, finished and polished. Color palette anchored in deep navy, teal, aqua, and muted green accents (#142836, #0081A4, #3EB3BD, #5EA974) with bright school-office light and editorial contrast. Composition should feel like a premium campaign art plate with intentional crop safety, visual energy centered away from edges, no document panels, no empty modules, no mock UI, no charts, no brochure scaffolding, no logo-like marks, no wordmarks, no arrows, no chevrons, no fake badges, no text, no numbers, no labels. Avoid generic classroom stock photography, graduation imagery, and over-specific sub-brand cues. Make it look like a high-end NY media/ad-agency education-sector hero image with nuanced depth, subtle motion, and strong supporting atmosphere for app-owned layout and copy to be added later.

request.topic: research-based educational supports and service pathways
request.notes: Use the parent brand without over-describing individual programs.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: Discover your pathway through WCEPS' research-based educational resources, publications, assessments, professional learning, program evaluations, and content alignment analyses.
sourceEvidence.label: Homepage positioning

sourceEvidence.excerpt: We are a non-profit committed to supporting educators in K-12 and higher education in their mission to support students and create an educational landscape where all students, regardless of their background, can thrive and reach their full potential.
sourceEvidence.label: Nonprofit purpose

sourceEvidence.excerpt: The Wisconsin Center for Education Products and Services is a 501(c)3 charitable non-profit organization with a mission to extend the impact of the University of Wisconsin-Madison's educational innovations and bring research-based, innovative, and customized educational solutions to schools and districts.
sourceEvidence.label: WCEPS mission footer

sourceEvidence.excerpt: As a non-profit organization offering research-based solutions, we strive to listen to what our district colleagues need, understand your challenges, and consider how our programs can help you reach your goals, without pushing things you don't need.
sourceEvidence.label: Contact page tone
